completed_tasks.name: Backend mechanics_json extension + compat layer deletion
Config system (getBookConfig) + CSS touch-action mobile fix
storage.js migration to /api/sessions + app.js module split + UI stubs

remaining_tasks.name: Browser console check: no ES module 404 errors on page load
Mobile tap test: touch-action fix prevents double-fire on stat buttons

human_actions_pending.action: Open http://localhost:3000 in browser, check console for 404s on js/ui/*.js or js/config/*.js imports
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 module split created new import paths; need to confirm browser loads them cleanly

human_actions_pending.action: Test stat +/- buttons on mobile or Chrome DevTools mobile emulation — verify no double-tap or 300ms delay
human_actions_pending.context: touch-action: manipulation CSS fix applied in 01-02

decisions.rationale: storage.js now calls /api/sessions directly; compat layer was dead code after migration

decisions.decision: Cherry-picked 01-02 worktree commits onto main after verifier caught them as orphaned
decisions.rationale: Parallel executor committed to an isolated worktree branch that was never merged back

decisions.decision: ui/stats.js receives state+callbacks as arguments — no import of app.js
decisions.rationale: Prevents circular dependency per D-17; app.js is the orchestrator
No migration complexity needed; existing saves not worth preserving

decisions.decision: Battle logs must persist to backend
decisions.rationale: User wants logs available when switching devices

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 2 or /gsd:plan-phase 2 to begin Phase 2: Core Mechanics (character creation, luck test, dice roller)
context_notes: Phase 1 fully complete and verified (11/11 must-haves). Two human UAT items remain (browser + mobile check) but are non-blocking. Server start command fixed in README — must run from project root with 'uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000 --reload'. Phase 2 has UI hint: yes, so /gsd:ui-phase 2 is recommended before planning.
